stages.name: unit_tests
stages.evidence: test/cli_test.zig 'help lists the real doctest subcommands and report formats' asserts the real --help output (via zentinel.dispatch) contains every doctest subcommand the binary accepts (doctest explain/suggest/review-snapshot/suggest-missing/explain-survivor/--mutate), the run report formats 'run --report <text|json|jsonl|junit>', and the truthful doctest format set 'doctest --format <text|json>'. It failed before the fix at cli_test.zig:33 ('doctest explain' absent from help). test/cli_test.zig 'route supersedes the removed not_implemented_commands list' asserts run/check/list-mutants/doctest route to concrete handlers and dispatch no longer returns ZNTL_CLI_COMMAND_NOT_IMPLEMENTED for them -- it failed before the fix because dispatch("run") returned cli_command_not_implemented. Full suite green (506 tests).

stages.name: real_binary_surface
stages.evidence: The built binary's `--help` lists the doctest subcommands and the report formats (run text|json|jsonl|junit, doctest text|json), matching docs/CLI_SPEC.md. `zentinel doctest --format jsonl` exits 2 with the clear message 'error[ZNTL_CLI_INVALID_OPTION]: --format must be text or json' -- jsonl is no longer advertised for doctest, so no advertised --format value returns an unexpected usage error.

stages.name: mutation_checks
stages.reason: Task 116 reconciles CLI help/spec drift and removes dead code; the behavioral fix is proven by a CLI test that fails before help_text lists the real surface and before the not_implemented_commands list is removed. The arithmetic compound-assignment item is a documented scope decision (no behavior change). Full self-mutation dogfood remains gated to task 085.

residual_risk: Compound-assignment arithmetic (`+=`, `-=`, `*=`, `/=`) is a documented out-of-scope decision for v1, not implemented: docs/MUTATOR_SPEC.md forbidden-contexts rows and src/mutators/arithmetic.zig both state it explicitly, resolving the spec drift without expanding the mutation surface (the task's 'no large new mutator work' non-goal). A future task may add compound-assignment operators behind their own spec rows and fixtures.

doctest output is text|json only; jsonl/junit are mutation-run report formats. The drift was removed by aligning the docs (and --help) with the already-correct code, which only ever accepted text|json for doctest. `doctest --format jsonl` returns a clear ZNTL_CLI_INVALID_OPTION naming the valid values.

The ZNTL_CLI_COMMAND_NOT_IMPLEMENTED error code stays defined in src/root.zig and the error taxonomy (docs/ERROR_CODES.md, docs/FAILURE_MODES.md) for any future roadmap command added before its handler lands, but no shipped command returns it now that route() owns the full command surface and the vestigial not_implemented_commands list (and the orphaned contains helper) are removed.

--help and docs/CLI_SPEC.md now both list the doctest subcommands and report formats; the help text remains snapshot-tested (test/snapshots/cli_help.txt) so future help edits stay in sync with the snapshot and CLI_SPEC.
